icp.label: Opportunity recovery prospect
icp.description: Founders, consultants, agencies, service businesses, and small B2B teams who manage warm leads and sales conversations. These are operators juggling stalled proposals, warm referrals that went cold, inconsistent follow-up, and wasted lead gen spend. They know what should happen but can't execute the daily rhythm.
trigger_set: Stalled proposals — opportunities stuck in late stage for 30+ days
Warm leads going cold — referred leads not converting, falling off
Lost referrals — referral partners frustrated with no follow-through
Inconsistent follow-up — team dropping the ball on existing inbound
Wasted lead gen spend — paying for leads but conversion is broken
Missed opportunities in inbox — warm conversations abandoned in CRM/email

triggers.label: Revenue leakage signals

stalled_proposals: founder OR consultant 'proposal sitting for months' OR 'stuck deal' 2026
agency OR consulting 'stalled client opportunities' OR 'pipeline stuck' 2026
small business owner 'lost deal momentum' OR 'proposal not moving' 2026
referral_breakdown: consultant OR founder 'referral partners' frustrated OR 'referrals not closing' 2026
service business 'referrals going to competitors' OR 'lost referral momentum' 2026
agency 'referral network' weak OR 'referrals falling through' 2026
lead_gen_waste: founder 'paying for leads but not converting' OR 'lead gen not working' 2026
consultant 'lead quality dropping' OR 'lead gen ROI broken' 2026
small business 'expensive leads' going nowhere OR 'CAC out of control' 2026
follow_up_breakdown: founder OR sales 'follow-up system broken' OR 'leads falling through cracks' 2026
agency 'CRM not being used' OR 'team inconsistent with follow-up' 2026
consultant 'warm lead' cold OR 'forgot to follow up' 2026
inbox_missed_opportunity: founder 'found old opportunity' in inbox OR 'missed warm introduction' 2026
consultant 'warm intro received' but not acted on OR 'lost in email' 2026
business owner 'good fit client' never heard back OR 'opportunity buried' 2026

triggers.triangulation_method: Proximity signal: look for content, posts, or company activity around follow-up, lead quality, closing, proposal management. Any mention of 'losing deals', 'referrals cold', 'follow-up breakdown' = PROSPECT. No qualification by revenue.

outreach_angles.name: Revenue leakage observation
outreach_angles.template: I noticed you're managing [warm leads/proposals/referrals] — exact place most operators leak 20-40% of potential revenue. Not through bad offers, but broken follow-up rhythm. Built a system to fix this. Worth exploring?

outreach_angles.name: Warm opportunity recovery
outreach_angles.template: Your next customer probably already knows your name — sitting in a warm intro, old proposal, or referral you didn't follow up. I help operators recover those conversations in 48 hours. Sound useful?

outreach_angles.name: Referral preservation
outreach_angles.template: Referral partners give out your name once. If you don't close, they stop. I help operators build the rhythm that turns referrals into closed deals. Quick conversation?

outreach_angles.name: Specific pain point
outreach_angles.template: I work with [consultants/agency owners/founders] who are leaking revenue through stalled proposals and cold referrals. We run a 48-hour sprint to diagnose the gap and build the system to fix it. Interested in exploring?

message_rules: Lead with revenue leakage observation, not pitch
Focus on missed revenue in warm pipeline (not cold outreach)
No qualification gate — if they have warm leads, they're a prospect
Reference something visible (website, LinkedIn activity, or inferred pain point)

confidence_score_mapping.90: HIGH - Strong revenue leakage signal + warm pipeline visible + decision authority
confidence_score_mapping.80: MEDIUM-HIGH - Clear warm pipeline + some leakage indicator
confidence_score_mapping.70: MEDIUM - Founder/consultant role + possible warm lead management
confidence_score_mapping.60: LOW - Generic fit but no visible signal yet

disqualification_rules: No visible warm lead pipeline or proposal management = DISQUALIFY
Person is pure contractor (no revenue responsibility) = DISQUALIFY
Company has fully outsourced sales = DISQUALIFY (no internal leakage to fix)

offer.name: 48-Hour Opportunity Recovery Sprint
offer.elevator_pitch: A working session — not a call. We diagnose your revenue leakage, identify one immediate fix, and map the system that prevents it from happening again.
offer.target_outcome: Walk out with diagnosis, recommendation, and clear decision point on next steps.

discovery_rhythm: Identify warm opportunity leakage signals in prospect activity
Draft personalized outreach connecting their visible pain to recovery sprint
Send via LinkedIn (primary) or email if available
content_rhythm: Monday: Opportunity leakage pain + recovery solution
Tuesday: Wasted lead gen spend / missed opportunities
Thursday: Warm referrals that went quiet
